optimizations.name: Windows Game Mode
optimizations.description: Enable Game Mode for optimized gaming experience
optimizations.explanation: Game Mode prioritizes gaming process resources and reduces background interruptions

optimizations.name: Disable Visual Effects
optimizations.description: Disable animations and transparency for FPS boost
optimizations.explanation: Reduces CPU/GPU load by disabling unnecessary visual effects like animations

optimizations.name: High Performance Power Plan
optimizations.description: Set power plan to High Performance
optimizations.explanation: Ensures CPU maintains maximum clock speed for consistent performance

optimizations.name: Disable Background Apps
optimizations.explanation: Frees up CPU/RAM by limiting background app execution

optimizations.name: Disable Mouse Acceleration
optimizations.description: Remove mouse acceleration for consistent aim
optimizations.explanation: Provides consistent mouse movement for better gaming control

optimizations.name: Disable USB Selective Suspend
optimizations.explanation: Ensures mouse and keyboard remain connected and responsive

optimizations.name: Disable Fullscreen Optimizations
optimizations.description: Disable fullscreen optimizations that may reduce latency
optimizations.explanation: Can reduce input lag on some systems by bypassing optimization layer

optimizations.name: Optimize Network Stack
optimizations.explanation: Reduces network latency for online gaming by tuning TCP parameters
